summary: Added collect-all structured provider L0 invariant validation errors. provider_l0_invariant_validation_result now collects all detectable provider L0 summary invariant failures and returns version v1 with ok/errors, where errors preserve structured code, message, path, and optional chunk_id. validate_provider_l0_invariants remains unchanged as the first-error raising API. CLI JSON validation output now benefits from complete error lists without new flags or schema-version changes. This does not add new validation rules, does not validate L0 chunk files, and does not change prompt assembly, context packs, L0 creation/loading, or provider calls. Full suite passed with 251 tests.
